decisions.name: Copy_1_of_Check_if_Sales_and_in_Approval_State
decisions.label: Copy 1 of Check if Sales and in Approval State

formulas.name: dealTitleText
formulas.expression: IF({!decision} = "Approve","Deal approved by " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " in the Pre-Sales team. - " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDate}),"Deal rejected by " & {!$User.FirstName} & " " & {!$User.LastName} & " in the Pre-Sales team. - " & TEXT({!$Flow.CurrentDate}))

fields.name: Is_delivery_contact_same_as_technical
fields.fieldText: Is delivery contact same as technical?

fields.name: Deal_In_Technical_Approval
fields.fieldText:
Opportunity submitted for Technical Approval.

Please wait or press "Yes" to recall.

fields.name: Hardware_Features_and_Functionality_Agreed
fields.fieldText: Describe in detail hardware features and functionality agreed with the customer
fields.helpText: Please include information on the features and functions of the hardware you are supplying that you have discussed with you customer i.e. Booklet Making or any other finishing requirements, Secure Print Enforced, Scan to Email, Scan to Network etc

fields.name: Software_Features_and_Functionality_Agreed
fields.fieldText: Describe in detail software features and functionality agreed with the customer
fields.helpText: Please include as much detail as possible that describes what features and functions of the software solution that the customer is expecting i.e. Billing codes for all prints, Card Authentication, Scan to OneDrive, Metadata Capture, Zonal OCR etc.

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_submit_the_deal_to_Tech_Evaluation
fields.fieldText: Would you like to submit the deal to Tech Evaluation?

fields.name: TE_Completed
fields.fieldText: Technical Evaluation has been completed. Would you like to update?
